title: Better Low Shield
description: Lower your shield to improve visibility -- ideal for PvP.
body:
# Better Low Shield - PvP Optimized Texture Pack

> Tired of bulky shields blocking your view in the middle of intense fights? **Better Low Shield** is a simple yet powerful texture pack that *lowers* your shield on-screen, giving you a clearer line of sight without removing the shield entirely. Perfect for PvP and competitive gameplay, this pack helps you stay aware of your surroundings while still keeping your defense up.

> ✅ Clean and minimal
> 
> ![POV WALKING](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/705c27182e5a03da1c787c6a61987006a359df02.gif)



> ✅ Ideal for PvP and fast-paced combat
>
> ![comparison with and without the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/849a1fb861ad377e38821590ee3a2ac44db7ed35_0.webp)

✅ Works seamlessly with most other packs!
Stay protected. See more. Win more.



> Other texture packs used in these pictures: 
[Better Dark Gui](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-dark-gui) , 
[Saturated MC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/saturated-mc)

please support me on paypal
